title: Lexium Remastered
description: Enter the Lexther, and find out the hidden secrets of a civilization of clones, and robots' wrath!
body:
# Mod discontinued- thank you all for a fun time!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/oR5ZT65Jr5E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Lexium is a mod that introduces two new unique dimensions, a species of dim-witted clones, and a dimension full of robots designed to kill.

In the first dimension, the Lexther, you can trade Lexium with the clones, "Lexes," to get various items and weapons. Along with this, the Lexes themselves are eager to talk, and overall are friendly towards the player.

The second dimension, HellX, is home to the robot army, known as "Hexes." Hexes are hell  bent on killing Lexes, though nobody is exactly sure why. These machines come in a variety of shapes and sizes, and can even camouflage as Lexes in the Lexther!

Along with these additions, there are several smaller editions between variants of mobs (Mutilated Hexes, Trader Lexes), other fun creatures (Ayma the dimensional defender, and Puck the Guinea Pig!), and a whole lot of background lore that can be solved by defeating the Final Hex in HellX, and exploring the lore he uncovers!

Completionists (such as myself) will also find a slew of advancements and collectable items, such as Plushes and Trading Cards!



This is a remake of my old mod, now called Lexium Classic. Same premise, but more random and very poorly made.
